title: Omit<T, K>
description: `Omit<{name; age; createdAt: Date; email}, 'email'>` removes the `email` key, resolving to `{name: string; age: number; createdAt: Date}`; the serializer sees the resolved (email-less) shape across JSON and binary.
notes: The kept `createdAt` Date round-trips via ISO string (JSON) / 8-byte float64 epoch (binary); the omitted `email` is absent from the resolved type and the wire.
